title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Spencer's Retail

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Spencer's Retail
jsonLd.description:
Spencer's Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!
